question: Which customers do not have any order? Give me the customer names.
sql: SELECT Name FROM customer WHERE Customer_ID NOT IN (SELECT Customer_ID FROM customer_order);

back_translation.intent: 查询未下订单的客户姓名
filters: Customer_ID NOT IN (SELECT Customer_ID FROM customer_order)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译准确表达了原始问题中'未下订单的客户姓名'的意图，正确使用了过滤条件Customer_ID NOT IN (SELECT Customer_ID FROM customer_order)来筛选没有订单的客户，并且目标列是Name。
